Class Event

java.lang.Object
Model.Event
public final class Event extends Object
Represents a single calendar event.

An event has a starting date and time, a duration, a title, a category, a location and a free-text description. It may also repeat (see Recurrence) and carry a list of attendees and a set of exception dates (occurrences that were individually removed from a recurring series).

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Event(int year, int month, int day, int hour, int minute, long duration, String title, String category, String description)
    Creates an event with all of its data.
    Event(int year, int month, int day, int hour, int minute, String title, String category, String description)
    Creates an event without an explicit duration; the duration defaults to one hour.

    Removes every attendee from the event.

  • Constructor Details

    • Event

      public Event(int year, int month, int day, int hour, int minute, long duration, String title, String category, String description)
      Creates an event with all of its data.
      Parameters:
      year - starting year
      month - starting month (1-12)
      day - starting day of month
      hour - starting hour (0-23)
      minute - starting minute (0-59)
      duration - duration in minutes
      title - event title
      category - event category
      description - free-text description
      Throws:
      DateTimeException - if the date or time is invalid

    • Event

      public Event(int year, int month, int day, int hour, int minute, String title, String category, String description)
      Creates an event without an explicit duration; the duration defaults to one hour.
      Parameters:
      year - starting year
      month - starting month (1-12)
      day - starting day of month
      hour - starting hour (0-23)
      minute - starting minute (0-59)
      title - event title
      category - event category
      description - free-text description
      Throws:
      DateTimeException - if the date or time is invalid

  • Method Details

    • setTime

      public void setTime(int hour, int minute) throws DateTimeException
      Sets the event time.
      Parameters:
      hour - hour of day (0-23)
      minute - minute (0-59)
      Throws:
      DateTimeException - if the hour or minute is out of range

    • setDate

      public void setDate(int year, int month, int day) throws DateTimeException
      Sets the event date.
      Parameters:
      year - year
      month - month (1-12)
      day - day of month
      Throws:
      DateTimeException - if the date does not exist

    • setTitle

      public void setTitle(String title) throws NullPointerException
      Sets the event title (trimmed).
      Parameters:
      title - the title
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if title is null

    • setDurationInMinutes

      public void setDurationInMinutes(long durationMinutes)
      Sets the duration in minutes.
      Parameters:
      durationMinutes - duration in minutes

    • setDurationInHours

      public void setDurationInHours(long hours, long minutes)
      Sets the duration from hours and minutes.
      Parameters:
      hours - hours
      minutes - minutes

    • setLocation

      public void setLocation(String location) throws NullPointerException
      Sets the event location.
      Parameters:
      location - the location
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if location is null

    • setCategory

      public void setCategory(String category) throws NullPointerException
      Sets the event category.
      Parameters:
      category - the category
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if category is null

    • setDescription

      public void setDescription(String description) throws NullPointerException
      Sets the event description.
      Parameters:
      description - the description
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if description is null

      public String getCategory()
      Returns:
      the event category

    • getDescription

      public String getDescription()
      Returns:
      the event description

    • getDate

      public LocalDate getDate()
      Returns:
      the starting date

    • getDuration

      public long getDuration()
      Returns:
      the duration in minutes

    • getLocation

      public String getLocation()
      Returns:
      the event location

    • getTime

      public LocalTime getTime()
      Returns:
      the starting time

    • getTitle

      public String getTitle()
      Returns:
      the event title

    • getEndOfEvent

      public LocalDateTime getEndOfEvent()
      Computes the moment the event ends, from its start plus its duration.
      Returns:
      the end date-time of the event

    • setReminderLeadMinutes

      public void setReminderLeadMinutes(long minutes)
      Sets the reminder lead time.
      Parameters:
      minutes - minutes before the start (0 = no reminder)

    • getReminderLeadMinutes

      public long getReminderLeadMinutes()
      Returns:
      minutes before the start at which the reminder fires (0 = none)

    • setRecurrence

      public void setRecurrence(Recurrence recurrence)
      Sets the recurrence rule.
      Parameters:
      recurrence - the recurrence rule

    • getRecurrence

      public Recurrence getRecurrence()
      Returns:
      the recurrence rule

    • addAttendee

      public void addAttendee(Attendee attendee)
      Adds a guest to the event.
      Parameters:
      attendee - the attendee to add

    • getAttendees

      public List<Attendee> getAttendees()
      Returns:
      the list of attendees

    • clearAttendees

      public void clearAttendees()
      Removes every attendee from the event.

    • addExceptionDate

      public void addExceptionDate(LocalDate date)
      Marks a date as an exception, removing a single occurrence from a series.
      Parameters:
      date - the date to exclude

    • getExceptionDates

      public Set<LocalDate> getExceptionDates()
      Returns:
      the set of excluded dates

    • isRecurring

      public boolean isRecurring()
      Returns:
      true if the event repeats

    • occursOn

      public boolean occursOn(LocalDate day)
      Tells whether the event takes place on the given day, taking the recurrence rule and the exception dates into account.
      Parameters:
      day - the day to test
      Returns:
      true if an occurrence falls on day

    • occurrenceStart

      public LocalDateTime occurrenceStart(LocalDate day)
      Exact moment (date + time) at which the occurrence on the given day starts.
      Parameters:
      day - the day of the occurrence
      Returns:
      the start date-time of that occurrence
